arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs Man Utd LIVE: Europa League team news and line-ups from crucial last-16 clash
arts.sum: The Europa League is Man Utd’s final chance for silverware this season after their FA Cup exit last weekend

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad vs Manchester United LIVE: Europa League updates, latest team news, lineups TV, prediction
arts.sum: Red Devils under major pressure with European glory all that’s left

arts.ttl: Roy Keane backed to ‘ruffle a few feathers’ at Man United as Sir Jim Ratcliffe receives message
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has endured a nightmare start to life as Manchester United head coach and a Red Devils icon believes Roy Keane is the best man to fix the club's leadership crisis

arts.ttl: Man Utd Lead Race to Sign 'Unstoppable' Attacker who is Faster Than Mbappe
arts.sum: Manchester United are considering a move for Borussia Dortmund forward Karim Adeyemi ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho responds to Man United 'revenge' claim as possible Europa League reunion emerges
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho's time at Manchester United was a whirlwind and he could face his former club this season

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad goalkeeper aims dig at Man Utd before Europa League tie
arts.sum: Real Sociedad goalkeeper Alex Remiro has admitted having sympathy with Manchester United because of the potential that exists in the squad, only to see things "always go wrong".

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo to Chelsea? Man Utd star issues Cole Palmer demand
arts.sum: Mainoo, 19, has less than two years remaining on his current deal at Man Utd and although he is in talks to sign a contract extension at the club, Chelsea are eyeing a possible transfer this summer. Following reports of Chelsea’s interest in Mainoo during the January transfer window, Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim told reporters: “Our idea is always to keep the best players and the players we build for this club.But we know the position the club is in at the moment.

arts.ttl: Man Utd icon Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals whether he regrets taking Leicester job
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has found life very difficult since swapping the Manchester United hotseat for the Leicester dugout and has revealed his stance on taking the role at the King Power Stadium
